matched.description: Number of workflow executions returned by the visibility query (single page, capped at limit). All matched executions are targeted; the rest of the response reflects how many of those succeeded or failed.

succeeded.description: Number of signal requests accepted by the Temporal frontend without error.

failed.description: Number of signal requests that returned a non-nil error (workflow not found, frontend error, signal handler unavailable, etc.).

errors.description: Per-workflow failure details, capped at 50 entries. When the list is truncated the response carries truncated=true and dropped=N — see those fields.

id.description: Workflow ID of the failed signal call.

error.description: Failure reason string returned by the SDK (often a Temporal serviceerror).

truncated.description: True when failed > len(errors[]). Always paired with dropped on the same response.

dropped.description: Number of failure entries omitted from errors[] because the 50-entry cap was hit. Sum errors[].len + dropped == failed.
